notes.title: Sprint planning notes
notes.content: Discussed Q3 roadmap. Need to ship the auth refactor by Friday. Mike will draft the API design doc. Schedule a follow-up with the design team next Tuesday.
notes.ai_summary: The team reviewed the Q3 roadmap and established deadlines for the upcoming authentication refactor. Key tasks include finalizing the API design documentation and coordinating with the design team for a follow-up session next week.
ai_action_items: Ship the auth refactor by Friday
Mike to draft the API design doc
Schedule a follow-up with design team next Tuesday
